subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O shining star! Rejoice thou in that the Countenance of the Ancient One hath turned toward thee from the direction of His Most Great Prison and made mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ستاره افرحی بما توجه الیک وجه القدم من شطر سجنه الاعظم و ذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love of God
